choices.text: Bar's value changes after the bar formed. Causes: lookahead_on in request.security, executing on unconfirmed bars, future-bar access. Fix: barstate.isconfirmed + close[1] from HTF. Backtest will then match live.

questions.explanation: Repainting = future leak; fix with isconfirmed + close[1].

choices.text: Touching OOS data after a fail. Tweaking params after seeing 2023 perform poorly → OOS becomes IS. Workflow: split once, optimize train only, OOS is one shot. Failure = back to drawing board on new IS data.

questions.explanation: Never re-optimize on OOS — destroys validation.
